true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to grant <color=#28d9ed>Increased Speed</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to grant <color=#28d9ed>Increased Speed</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy. After using this skill, reduces the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Grieving Orpheus</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>【悲嘆のオルフェウス】</color>のスキルターンが<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>비탄의 오르페우스</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,并使<color=#28d9ed>悲叹的俄耳甫斯</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's and target's Speed.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは、自分と対象のスピードが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신과 대상의 속도가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人。\n自身和目标的速度越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's and target's Speed.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは、自分と対象のスピードが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신과 대상의 속도가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击敌人。\n自身和目标的速度越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy and steals <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's and target's Speed.
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color><color=#28d9ed>1個</color>を奪う。\nこのスキルは、自分と対象のスピードが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.3_kr: 적을 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 빼앗습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신과 대상의 속도가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.3_zh: 攻击敌人,并夺取目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n自身和目标的速度越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy and steals <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's and target's Speed.
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color><color=#28d9ed>1個</color>を奪う。\nこのスキルは、自分と対象のスピードが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.4_kr: 적을 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 빼앗습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신과 대상의 속도가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.4_zh: 攻击敌人,并夺取目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n自身和目标的速度越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy and steals <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's and target's Speed.
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color><color=#28d9ed>2個</color>を奪う。\nこのスキルは、自分と対象のスピードが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적을 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 빼앗습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신과 대상의 속도가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击敌人,并夺取目标的<color=#28d9ed>2个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n自身和目标的速度越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> of the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>標的</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 대상 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>표식</color>을 부여합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对1名目标造成<color=#28d9ed>标记</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,使自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> of the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>標的</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。
true_desc_levels.2_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 대상 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>표식</color>을 부여합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对1名目标造成<color=#28d9ed>标记</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,使自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

true_desc_levels.5: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> of the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.5_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>標的</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。
true_desc_levels.5_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 대상 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>표식</color>을 부여합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对1名目标造成<color=#28d9ed>标记</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,使自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

2: +5% Dual Attack and Skill Chain damage
